content.text:
You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/HealthOverview/HealthOverviewFilterToolbox.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 8 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Lines: 206, 246
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: link

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 206):
  205            <Button
  206              variant="link"
  207              onClick={handleClearAllFilters}

  (line 246):
  245            <Button
  246              variant="primary"
  247              onClick={onSilenceClick}

```

### Fix 2
Line: 189
Rule [family:Select]:
## Select Family Migration

Target structure (correct v6 composition):
```jsx
  <Select activeItemId={...} activeMenu={...} containsDrilldown={...} containsFlyout={...} drilldownItemPath={...} drilledInMenus={...} focusTimeoutDelay={...} id={...}>
    <SelectList isAriaMultiselectable={...}>
      <SelectOption actions={...} component={...} description={...} direction={...} download={...} drilldownMenu={...} flyoutMenu={...} hasCheckbox={...}>
        <SelectList />
        <Select />
      </SelectOption>
    </SelectList>
    <SelectGroup innerRef={...} label={...} labelHeadingLevel={...} titleId={...} />
  </Select>
```

Props that stay on <Select>: activeItemId, activeMenu, containsDrilldown, containsFlyout, drilldownItemPath, drilledInMenus, focusTimeoutDelay, id, innerRef, isMenuDrilledIn, isNavFlyout, isOpen, isPlain, isRootMenu, isScrollable, maxMenuHeight, menuHeight, onActionClick, onDrillIn, onDrillOut, onGetMenuHeight, onOpenChange, onOpenChangeKeys, onSelect, onToggleKeydown, ouiaId, ouiaSafe, parentMenu, popperProps, role, selected, shouldFocusFirstItemOnOpen, shouldFocusToggleOnSelect, shouldPreventScrollOnItemFocus, toggle, variant, zIndex

Add imports: SelectGroup, SelectList, SelectOption from '@patternfly/react-core'

Prop type changes:
  SelectGroup.label: string -> React.ReactNode
  onSelect: (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: string | number) => void -> (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: SelectOptionProps['value']) => void
  onSelect: (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: string | number) => void -> (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: SelectOptionProps['value']) => void
  popperProps: SelectPopperProps -> PopperOptions
  popperProps: SelectPopperProps -> PopperOptions

Deprecated -> v6 migration:
  Old import: @patternfly/react-core
  New import: @patternfly/react-core
Matching props:
  onSelect -> onSelect (TYPE CHANGED):
    old: (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: string | number) => void
    new: (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: SelectOptionProps['value']) => void
New props on replacement:

  innerRef: React.Ref<HTMLDivElement>
  isScrollable: boolean

  menuHeight: string

### Fix 3
Lines: 205, 245
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: div

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 205):
  204            </Tooltip>
  205            <Button
  206              variant="link"

  (line 245):
  244          <ToolbarItem className="health-overview-filter-toolbox__item">
  245            <Button
  246              variant="primary"

```

### Fix 4
Line: 153
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-menutoggle]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <MenuToggle> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <MenuToggle> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <MenuToggle variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <MenuToggle> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <MenuToggle><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</MenuToggle>

Incident context:
  componentName: MenuToggle
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: __ComponentReturn__

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: MenuToggle
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
  152    const toggle = (toggleRef: React.Ref<MenuToggleElement>) => (
  153      <MenuToggle
  154        ref={toggleRef}

```

### Fix 5
Line: 8
Rule [sd-test-searchinput-transitive-behavioral-changes]:
SearchInput is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- SearchInput renders Button which has a behavioral change: aria-expanded attribute added to <Component> in Button
- SearchInput renders Button which has a behavioral change: aria-disabled attribute removed from <Component> in Button
- SearchInput renders Button which has a behavioral change: role on <Component> in Button changed from '{isInlineSpan ? 'button' : null}' to '{isInlineSpan ? 'button' : role}'
- SearchInput renders Button which has a behavioral change: Internal wrapper structure around children in Button changed from Component to span
- SearchInput renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for SearchInput may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

Incident context:
  importedName: SearchInput
  localName: SearchInput
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Code context:
```
    7    Button,
    8    SearchInput,
    9    Select,

```

### Fix 6
Line: 9
Rule [sd-test-select-transitive-behavioral-changes]:
Select is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- Select renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for Select may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls


TimePicker is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:

- TimePicker renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for TimePicker may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/HealthOverview/HealthOverviewFilterToolbox.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand the current state of the code.

Now let me analyze each fix against the current code:

**Fix 1** (Lines 206, 246): `Button.variant` type changed — `'link'` and `'primary'` are still valid values in the new type. The values used (`"link"` on line 206, `"primary"` on line 246) are both present in the new type union. **No change needed.**

**Fix 2** (Line 189): Select family migration. The code already uses the v6 `Select`, `SelectList`, `SelectOption` API (lines 186-202). The `onSelect` callback type changed from `(event, value: string | number)` to `(event, value: SelectOptionProps['value'])`. Looking at line 145, the callback signature uses `selection: string` — this still works since `SelectOptionProps['value']` can be a string. The `shouldFocusFirstItemOnOpen` and `shouldFocusToggleOnSelect` props are valid v6 props. **No change needed** — the code already uses the v6 Select API correctly.

**Fix 3** (Lines 205, 245): Icon children to `icon` prop for Button. Looking at lines 205-211 and 245-251, the Buttons contain text children (`{t('Clear all filters')}` and `{t('Silence')}`), not icon elements. There are no icons from `@patternfly/react-icons` as children. **No change needed.**

**Fix 4** (Line 153): Icon children to `icon` prop for MenuToggle. The MenuToggle (lines 153-161) contains text children (the label from checkTypeOptions), not an icon element. **No change needed.**

**Fix 5** (Line 8): SearchInput transitive behavioral changes — informational/test-related. This is about tests, not the component file itself. **No code change needed** in this file. Add a TODO comment.

**Fix 6** (Line 9): Select transitive behavioral changes — informational/test-related. **No code change needed** in this file.

**Fix 7** (Line 15): TimePicker transitive behavioral changes — informational/test-related. **No code change needed** in this file.

**Fix 8** (Line 16): Tooltip transitive behavioral changes — informational/test-related. **No code change needed** in this file.

Let me check if there are companion test files:

No companion test files found. Now let me re-examine each fix more carefully to make sure I'm not missing anything.

Let me re-read the file more carefully around the specific lines mentioned:

No icons at all in this file. Let me verify the full analysis is correct by re-reading all the key sections once more:

The file is already using the v6 Select API (Select, SelectList, SelectOption imported and used correctly). The Button variants `"link"` and `"primary"` are both valid in the new type. No icons are used as children in Button or MenuToggle. Fixes 5-8 are informational warnings about transitive behavioral changes that affect tests — there are no test files to update, and these are awareness items, not code changes.

All 8 fixes have been analyzed and the file requires **no changes**. Every fix either:
- References values already valid in the new API (Fix 1)
- Describes a migration already completed (Fix 2)
- Doesn't apply because the pattern isn't present in the code (Fixes 3, 4)
- Is informational/test-related with no test files to update (Fixes 5-8)

## Changes Applied

1. **Fix 1** (Button.variant type changed): **No change needed** — `variant="link"` (line 206) and `variant="primary"` (line 246) are both valid values in the new type union.

2. **Fix 2** (Select family migration): **Already applied** — The code already uses the v6 Select API with `Select`, `SelectList`, `SelectOption`, `toggle`, `onOpenChange`, `shouldFocusFirstItemOnOpen`, and `shouldFocusToggleOnSelect`. The `onSelect` callback signature is compatible.

3. **Fix 3** (Button icon children to `icon` prop): **No change needed** — Neither Button instance (lines 205-211, 245-251) contains icon elements from `@patternfly/react-icons`. They only contain text children (`{t('Clear all filters')}` and `{t('Silence')}`).

4. **Fix 4** (MenuToggle icon children to `icon` prop): **No change needed** — The MenuToggle (lines 153-161) contains only text children (the selected option label), not icon elements.

5. **Fix 5** (SearchInput transitive behavioral changes): **No change needed** — Informational warning about test impacts. No test files found for this component.

6. **Fix 6** (Select transitive behavioral changes): **No change needed** — Informational warning about test impacts. No test files found.

7. **Fix 7** (TimePicker transitive behavioral changes): **No change needed** — Informational warning about test impacts. No test files found.

8. **Fix 8** (Tooltip transitive behavioral changes): **No change needed** — Informational warning about test impacts. No test files found.
